label: Market Detail
description: Single market detail view with price history, order book summary, and quick trade entry.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with 'Select a market from the Markets grid' prompt when selectedMarket is null. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with 'Select a market from the Markets grid' prompt when selectedMarket is null. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads selectedMarket, markets, setSelectedMarketId exclusively via usePredictionsData() — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3: Market list is global (all prediction venues) — scope filtering applies to positions, not the market catalogue. Selected market state is independent of org scope by design. 1.4: clientIds from globalScope not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for market catalogue display. 1.6: Empty scope returns full market list (markets is MOCK_MARKETS — unscoped by design). 1.7: No reference data in lib/mocks/ consumed by this widget.

Selected market state is independent of org scope by design. 1.4: clientIds from globalScope not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for market catalogue display. 1.6: Empty scope returns full market list (markets is MOCK_MARKETS — unscoped by design). 1.7: No reference data in lib/mocks/ consumed by this widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings.description: 0.6/0.8 — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following established DeFi context pattern.
